title: monkeysmod[fabric]
description:
a mod me made randomly
it dosnt have a theme
just what ever me feel like coding and me want to attempt to adding to minecraft
body:
me wanted to make a mod with out understanding java so did it

anything that pops in my head and is able to make it in to the game will be added to this mod

so far theres evil food monsters bc adding my banana bunch to a jungle tree was to much work

u can find bananas in all the jungle biomes
pineapples in beach and jungles
apples in forests and darkforests
coconuts in desearts and beach 
meat in the planes 
and
mince pies in the snowy biomes (not sure about mounten tops tho)

the banana picker is requiered to pick bananas off the banana bunch block u can find it only form trading with the wandering trader (may add it to jungle temple loot tables later)

the carrot drill is a tool that brakes stone in a 3x3x3 area but not ores (is buged atm ment to only brake in 3x1x3...or 3x3x1...dimentions are confusing

the harm bat is a chunk of meat that has the attack power of a diamond sword but gets weaker as it loses durabilty

the pine apple needs to be used on a end rod to pop the stem out then u used the cored pine apple by shift right clicking it on a stone cutter to get pineapple rings 

the coconut shell can be lobed at your enermys to hurt them or put a brick(item not block) in your off hand and click to smash the shell open and get coconut food

the meat monster drops raw meat and cooked meat shift click them on a stone cutter to get random meat food or the harm bat

put milk in a vanilla cauldron and wait a bit to get cheese
place the cheese block on the ground and click on it with a stick to get slices of cheese or a iron bar to grate it

crafting beef/pork pineapple rings grated cheese and wheet to make a raw pizza cook it to get cooked pizza u place on the ground and then right click it like a cake to get slices of cooked pizza

theres a william tell apple and a frozen apple but its a screct on how u get them

ive got a pizza boss monster and a pizza shield planed but having troble getting them to work
and a golden carrot drill that can be used to brake ores and some other stuff in my head like monkeys (but animations dont work so not sure yet)
